posts.author: avi.bachar.ap (Avi Bachar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi I have 2 monday account

  1. is pro-dev - recently created
  2. is enterprise- work management
    in the dev there is a very good item widget (a widget in the item sidebar) it is called Table.
    when selected one can select a connection-column (to other boards) and see in a table view all the items from the other boards connected to the viewed item

in work management I can’t find this gadget
is it possible to add?
am I missing something?
